module_info.docstring:
Interactive wizard for exporting mailboxes and deploying to GitHub Pages.

This script automates the entire workflow:
1. Select projects and export options
2. Preview the bundle locally
3. Create/update GitHub repository
4. Enable GitHub Pages
5. Push and deploy

Requirements:
- gh CLI installed and authenticated (gh auth status)
- git configured with user.name and user.email

functions.name: find_available_port
functions.docstring: Find an available port in the given range (inclusive).

functions.name: parse_selection
functions.docstring: Parse selection string like '1,3,5' or '1-3,5' into list of indices.

functions.name: save_config
functions.docstring: Save wizard configuration for next run.

functions.name: load_last_config
functions.docstring: Load last wizard configuration if it exists.

functions.name: clear_resume_state
functions.docstring: Remove any saved in-progress session and workspace bundle.

functions.name: save_resume_state
functions.docstring: Persist current wizard session state for resuming later.

functions.name: load_resume_state
functions.docstring: Load in-progress session state if available and consistent.

functions.name: _refresh_viewer_assets
functions.docstring:
Overwrite viewer assets in an existing bundle with the latest packaged files.

This ensures CSP and scripts are up to date even when reusing a prior export.

functions.name: estimate_bundle_size
functions.docstring: Estimate bundle size based on project count (rough approximation).

functions.name: validate_github_repo_available

functions.name: detect_existing_github_repo
functions.docstring: Check if GitHub repo already exists.

functions.name: detect_package_manager
functions.docstring: Detect the available package manager on this system.

functions.name: install_gh_cli
functions.docstring: Offer to install gh CLI automatically.

functions.name: install_wrangler_cli
functions.docstring: Offer to install wrangler CLI automatically.

functions.name: authenticate_gh_cli
functions.docstring: Guide user through gh CLI authentication.

functions.name: authenticate_wrangler_cli
functions.docstring: Guide user through wrangler CLI authentication.

functions.name: check_prerequisites
functions.docstring: Check if required tools are installed and configured.

functions.name: select_scrub_preset

functions.name: select_deployment_target

functions.name: generate_signing_key

functions.name: export_bundle
functions.docstring: Export mailbox bundle.

functions.name: main
functions.docstring: Main wizard flow.
